title: クライマックス1戦目の後に

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That was a spectacular race! Truly fit for a
"climax"!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However! The road to greatness still stretches out
far ahead!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hence the aggressive encouragement! I sincerely
hope that <chrname> races valiantly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right. For better or worse, there are still two
rounds to go! We can't let our guard down yet!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That was a spectacular race! Truly fit for a
"climax"!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Great admiration! <chrname> has an
indomitable will! Her gaze is already fixed on the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The road to greatness still stretches out far
ahead! However! The road is by no means closed!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hence the aggressive encouragement! I sincerely
hope that <chrname> races valiantly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right. For better or worse, there are still two
rounds to go! We still have a chance!
